package handler

import (
	"net/http"
	"testing"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/driver/postgres"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type User struct {
	ID    uint   `gorm:"primaryKey"`
	Name  string `gorm:"column:name"`
	Email string `gorm:"column:email"`
}

func TestGetUserHandler_RealDatabase(t *testing.T) {
	dsn := "host=localhost user=testuser password=testpass dbname=testdb port=5432 sslmode=disable TimeZone=UTC"
	db, err := gorm.Open(postgres.Open(dsn), &gorm.Config{})
	if err != nil {
		t.Fatalf("failed to connect database: %v", err)
	}

	db.AutoMigrate(&User{})
	db.Create(&User{Name: "Test User", Email: "test@example.com"})

	w := performRequest(func(c *gin.Context) {
		var user User
		db.Where("email = ?", "test@example.com").First(&user)
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, user)
	}, "GET", "/users/1")

	if w.Code != http.StatusOK {
		t.Errorf("expected status 200, got %d", w.Code)
	}
}

func TestCreateUserHandler_RealDatabase(t *testing.T) {
	dsn := "host=localhost user=testuser password=testpass dbname=testdb port=5432 sslmode=disable TimeZone=UTC"
	db, err := gorm.Open(postgres.Open(dsn), &gorm.Config{})
	if err != nil {
		t.Fatalf("failed to connect database: %v", err)
	}

	db.AutoMigrate(&User{})

	w := performRequest(func(c *gin.Context) {
		var user User
		c.ShouldBindJSON(&user)
		db.Create(&user)
		c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, user)
	}, "POST", "/users")

	if w.Code != http.StatusCreated {
		t.Errorf("expected status 201, got %d", w.Code)
	}
}
